item.title: Earlybirds Club
item.description:
Saturday, July 11, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: White Oak Music Hall - Downstairs, 2915 N Main St, Houston, TX

Doors: 6pm Earlybirds Club is a dance party for women and gender expansive folks that starts at 6pm and ends at 10pm ? because we have sh*t to do in the mornin DJ Caribbeats spins the songs that live in your bones: 80s, 90s, and 2000s pop, hip-hop, new wave, and R&B. But Earlybirds Club is more than a night out. It?s a permission slip to take up space. To be loud, weird, wild, sweaty, sparkly, sentimental, and completely yourself. It?s a judgment-free dance floor built on joy, kindness, connection, and the shared understanding that sensible footwear is a love language. And because joy is even better when it gives back, 10% of ticket proceeds go to the Susie Lee Legacy Fund, supporting nonprofits that uplift women, gender-expansive people, and communities who need it most. This show is 21+ All General Admission Tickets are Standing Room only IMPORTANT: WHITE OAK MUSIC HALL IS A CASHLESS VENUE. Please be sure to bring a debit or credit card. Doors: 6pm Earlybirds Club is a dance party for women and gender expansive folks that starts at 6pm and ends at 10pm ? because we have sh*t to do in the mornin DJ Caribbeats spins the songs that live in your bones: 80s, 90s, and 2000s pop, hip-hop, new wave, and R&B. But Earlybirds Club is more than a night out. It?s a permission slip to take up space. To be loud, weird, wild, sweaty, sparkly, sentimental, and completely yourself. It?s a judgment-free dance floor built on joy, kindness, connection, and the shared understanding that sensible footwear is a love language. And because joy is even better when it gives back, 10% of ticket proceeds go to the Susie Lee Legacy Fund, supporting nonprofits that uplift women, gender-expansive people, and communities who need it most. This show is 21+ All General Admission Tickets are Standing Room only IMPORTANT: WHITE OAK MUSIC HALL IS A CASHLESS VENUE. Please be sure to bring a debit or credit card.

Event details

item.title: Sweet Pill
item.description:
Wednesday, August 19, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: White Oak Music Hall - Downstairs, 2915 N Main St, Houston, TX

Doors: 7pm Sweet Pill has partnered with PLUS1 so that $1 from every ticket sold goes to Calling All Crows and their work mobilizing music fans and artists to fuel feminist movements. item.title: Love in the Club: 2000's Hip Hop & R&B Dance Party
item.description:
Saturday, September 5, 2026 at 9 PM

Location: White Oak Music Hall - Upstairs , 2915 N Main St,, Houston, TX

Doors: 9pm LOVE IN THE CLUB is the ultimate 2000s R&B and hip hop dance party. A night dedicated to the era of flip phones, iconic music videos, and unforgettable club anthems. From Usher to Missy Elliott to Akon, we?re bringing the most iconic club era and hits you grew up on back to the dance floor This show is 18+ All General Admission Tickets are Standing Room only IMPORTANT: WHITE OAK MUSIC HALL IS A CASHLESS VENUE. item.title: Friko Something Worth Waiting For : The Tour
item.description:
Thursday, September 10, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: White Oak Music Hall - Upstairs , 2915 N Main St,, Houston, TX

Doors: 7pm This show is ALL AGES All General Admission Tickets are Standing Room only IMPORTANT: WHITE OAK MUSIC HALL IS A CASHLESS VENUE. Please be sure to bring a debit or credit card. Friko has partnered with PLUS1 so that $1 from every ticket will go to Santa for a Day, a certified 501(c)(3) Public Charity who answers letters to Santa from kids in underserved communities. This two-pronged literacy component is vital to their mission: Volunteers helping, teaching youngsters the power of the pen? and then donors rewarding their efforts, by translating their wishes into reality, not only positively reinforces their nascent literacy skills, but it also helps participants author a different, more positive narrative about life, one sparked by optimism and the vision of a brighter future. santaforaday.org Doors: 7pm This show is ALL AGES All General Admission Tickets are Standing Room only IMPORTANT: WHITE OAK MUSIC HALL IS A CASHLESS VENUE. Please be sure to bring a debit or credit card. Friko has partnered with PLUS1 so that $1 from every ticket will go to Santa for a Day, a certified 501(c)(3) Public Charity who answers letters to Santa from kids in underserved communities. This two-pronged literacy component is vital to their mission: Volunteers helping, teaching youngsters the power of the pen? and then donors rewarding their efforts, by translating their wishes into reality, not only positively reinforces their nascent literacy skills, but it also helps participants author a different, more positive narrative about life, one sparked by optimism and the vision of a brighter future. santaforaday.org

Event details
